# Requirements Quality Checklist: Make Final Decision Use Case

**Purpose**: Validate completeness, clarity, and consistency of the final decision requirements.
**Created**: 2026-02-09
**Feature**: /home/aiden/ECE_493_Lab_2/specs/009-make-final-decision/spec.md

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are prerequisites for making a decision (three completed reviews) explicitly specified? [Completeness, Spec §Acceptance Scenarios]
- [ ] CHK002 Are requirements defined for decision options (accept vs. reject) and how they are chosen? [Gap]
- [ ] CHK003 Are requirements included for notification delivery failures? [Completeness, Spec §Acceptance Scenarios]
- [ ] CHK004 Are requirements specified for database/update failures? [Gap, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK005 Are requirements specified for re-decision or corrections after submission? [Gap]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK006 Is “make final decision” defined with explicit success outcomes (decision stored, author notified)? [Clarity, Spec §Acceptance Scenarios]
- [ ] CHK007 Is “no decision stored if prerequisites unmet” defined with measurable criteria? [Clarity, Spec §FR-006]
- [ ] CHK008 Are error messages described with minimum content expectations? [Clarity, Spec §FR-004]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK009 Do acceptance scenarios align with functional requirements for validation and error handling? [Consistency, Spec §FR-002, Spec §FR-004]
- [ ] CHK010 Do edge cases map to explicit requirements rather than remaining open questions? [Consistency, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK011 Are success criteria measurable without relying on implementation details? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001]
- [ ] CHK012 Are success criteria aligned with the defined scope in requirements? [Consistency, Spec §SC-001, Spec §Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK013 Are acceptance scenarios complete for all failure types listed (insufficient reviews, notification failure, update failure)? [Coverage, Spec §Acceptance Scenarios, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK014 Are primary and exception flows fully specified for final decision? [Coverage, Spec §User Scenarios & Testing]
- [ ] CHK015 Are recovery actions defined after a failed decision attempt? [Completeness, Spec §User Story 2]
- [ ] CHK016 Are retry behaviors defined for failed notifications? [Gap]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK017 Are edge cases written as concrete requirements rather than open questions? [Ambiguity, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK018 Are boundary conditions defined for the review count prerequisite? [Clarity, Spec §Acceptance Scenarios]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [ ] CHK019 Are performance expectations specified in the requirements (not just the plan)? [Gap]
- [ ] CHK020 Are accessibility requirements defined for decision actions and errors? [Gap]
- [ ] CHK021 Are privacy or data handling requirements specified for decision records? [Gap]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [ ] CHK022 Are assumptions about notification mechanisms explicitly tracked with a resolution path? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK023 Are dependencies on external artifacts (use cases, scenarios, acceptance tests) explicitly mapped? [Traceability, Spec §User Scenarios & Testing]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [ ] CHK024 Are decision-related terms used consistently across requirements and scenarios? [Ambiguity]
- [ ] CHK025 Are there any conflicts between acceptance scenarios and functional requirements? [Conflict, Spec §Acceptance Scenarios, Spec §FR-004]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
